description: Mike Dudas discusses how to run a crypto business, emphasizing the importance of resilience, curiosity, and the right partnerships in the crypto ecosystem. He shares insights from his experience as managing partner of Six Man Ventures and highlights the unique challenges of the crypto industry compared to traditional tech startups.
topic_summary: In this talk, Mike Dudas outlines key strategies for successfully operating a crypto business, focusing on team dynamics, market unpredictability, and the necessity of adapting ideas to meet evolving customer needs. He stresses the significance of building a strong, resilient team and understanding the motivations of individuals in the crypto space [t=5:92-262:16].
